name: Cut & finish
desc: A bespoke cut shaped to your hair and your life. Wash, cut, blow-dry.

name: Colour service
desc: Single-process colour, root touch-up or full coverage. Salon-grade product only.

name: Balayage
desc: Hand-painted highlights for soft, sun-kissed dimension that grows out beautifully.

name: Bridal styling
desc: Trial and on-the-day styling for brides and the wedding party.

name: Treatments
desc: Olaplex, glossing and deep-conditioning rituals for damaged or coloured hair.

name: Consultation
desc: A no-obligation consultation before any major change. Always free.
